hcb73c101g87e2g4fecgbe64g7c4a67f3efd3: We was running for our lives.
h9cd3433cgae38g4146ga66dgc2833a062f77: You led them straight to us. And you let them take the druid, too. Unbelievable!
h34851f7egee62g4558gb41fgfefc4eb05910: Where there's one goblin, there's ten. I'm leaving before the horde shows up.
hd03bef91gb850g421eg8d57gfe10d31a594d: He's right. We should scram while we can.
h54057b1dg8f63g4ac7gaf85g2e909253a68f: She's right. We should scram while we can.
h672c7d2bg293fg4a44gb814gb24be5831a28: Right. Lead goblins here, then leave the rest of us to fight them off. You coward.
h0a536923g8ba9g4752ga971g35e9080dd733: What's it gonna take to shut you up, horns?
h9374e956gc65fg4081gae33g2f369f33b998: One fight just ended, and now you're picking another? Relax.
h56802774gd14cg487dg8575g1b52410ba0c5: Tell that to the dead at the gate.
hf36ea65bga13bg4093g9e98g4f9374cb85fa: Shut it, horns. I'd be lying dead next to the goblins if you'd stalled any longer.
h211e3895g7d12g4704gaf3cg81a5bf8eda7b: My duty is to this camp.
h882f57e5gf566g41begafeeg1743962fbdfd: God forbid you risk your precious tail. But I shouldn't be surprised.
hea903441gd3ebg4f84ga888gc250c47552bc: Want me to knock you both out? Or skip the broken bones and just calm down?
ha4e6fe14gbe47g4f20gac05g4b00fcb2384a: Enough. Squabbling is pointless. The goblins have found us.
h02e11d59g8fa9g48e0gabbegf718a61af892: At least we agree on that.
h7ba84b4ag77dag4cdfgbaffgafc894b19933: If you want me to take both of you down, I will. Otherwise, knock it off.
h9a76992dgc999g48d4g8f2cg79939b4e968e: *With a thunk, the armoured man collapses - unconscious.*
h4992d770g7f07g4772ga067g3669253e9053: The goblins have found us. No doubt, the beasts will be back.
had7365cdg6e8cg45d5g9ec1g99186fbf1c19: We need to pack up and leave. Immediately.
hcae5b0fcg23afg414aga094g04bf35decb11: Shoulda done that a long time ago. Arrogant prick had it out for me from day one.
h25dbf1dagbd89g4386g8ba0gbeec7d145edd: No one leaves my people out cold.
h74efbf5eg84a6g489dgba67gaa184fa6cfd1: You put him in a bind, showing up like that. And he did try to open the gate.
h422ec8c1ge471g45e4g9f40g9455d2611f09: He was right though. Coming back to this hellhole was a mistake no amount of gold can put right.
h11d4de93gb429g41c6ga189ga1aa65746704: I'd rather face another round of goblins than stay in this pit.
hb531ec60g174dg4130g9f4cg53d694d5da55: So you knocked him out cold instead. Clever.
hc97907cfg635dg43f8g9ae3gc7d1d12bf02a: Only way he'd shut that hole under his nose.
h85629a2cg8fe6g44c7g8230g35fa6c1ae6de: More violence won't bring back those you lost. Stop and think.
he6ddaa3ag59d7g4dc7gbc1fg6a330909102e: You're right. There's too much at stake.
hff77ded2gcf8ag451bg8bc9gcb55fa104610: Worried about your precious hides, the both of you.
h71feb2a8gb1ffg413cga59bgce4c355fb750: He's human - malice comes as naturally as breathing. Just show him you're the better man.
h625c380ag10a1g4fb1g85b3g75057727ea86: Forgive me, sister. I... forgot myself.
h0f245bbbgbe29g457eg86c1g31c101b571f8: Forgive me, brother. I... forgot myself.
h8ce05a82g025eg48b5g98c8g39a4b0bddf27: We have people to protect. Let us work towards that.
hce9ec752g4e5fg4275gbb3bg9050e3108d42: *You see the tiefling's jaw clench. He's about to erupt.*
h35a117f2g8e96g4930g9493g4f734b1d1fab: Damn. Didn't expect a devilkin to turn on one of their own.
h3ce34ff2ge40bg45c0ga728ga87db1777aae: Damn. You knocked him clean out.
h1d65a4cdg8691g4c2cgbc83g3295042fff88: I prefer to settle matters with my own hands.
h8f42702bg798dg43d6gb56ag4aee5d6f5192: Aradin Beno. Leader of the Beno Boys. Adventurers for hire 'n' all.
hfefdcb11g37f0g4e26g83fcgf8d494bd514e: You're not locals then. Who runs this place?
h42b1fe73g889bg4d67g93ecg479ea09d54f4: Got a healer in your crew?
hfce8768fg0b1eg4238gb4d7gba3d4c45e5be: What would be nice is a healer. Do me a favour and point me to one.
h9658c9b5g47d9g4448g94fegbbc0124629b0: Somebody had to. Just tell me what this place is - I feel magic in the trees.
h0747073fg56cbg4219gaa3dgef3774e5c4cc: I didn't do it for your praise. Just tell me what this place is.
hfd27bdcag7c1eg4a85ga0e5g08739aa5c2fd: Ah, 'devilkin'. Certainly never heard that one before. Creative.
h7a604ee9g20d1g4565g944fg24ddc37e5594: I'm sure you think so. Now point me at a healer.
h7eb0a15cgf556g47acga6b1g039a25902538: You're outta luck. Halsin - druid who runs this place - knew his stuff. But he ain't here anymore.
h0623843fg23c0g4846gb7d4g344706920c24: Got himself nabbed by gobbos - same ones what chased us here.
h8822e236g90b1g4583gb546g1a302f0721e8: He's either diggin' latrines or boilin' in a cookpot by now.
h3ac8d8b4ge124g4cb5gb55dg5ed4dbda79ee: Think he's got an apprentice running around somewheres though. Nadine? Natalie? Something like that.
h3b231cbeg07e9g4dc0g87a7g4e5c322cb822: What was important enough to drag a druid out of his grove?
h9bbbf6d7g2febg466agb379g82067fb54fea: We've got a contract to track down some relic, and he wanted in on the job. Eyes lit up when he heard about it.
h76890fd5gecc0g4e9bga055g5fe03b365163: I told him he wasn't getting so much as a sniff of the reward, but he tagged along anyhow.
h1849ee4cg4cc0g45fag9d05g1c36b27e73ec: Maybe I could take that job off your hands, if you've lost your appetite for it.
hfaf1cbc4g63b1g4618g983ag41d07ab4722b: Got a death wish, have you? Contract came from a wizard in Baldur's Gate.
h07c0195dg639ag4ba4ga569g2618966e89db: Relic's supposedly hidden underneath a temple round these parts, and he'll pay gobloads for it.
hd66498e4g289fg4272g9b10ge93937e17e11: But all that gold ain't gonna do you any good if you're too cold to spend it.
hf5982734g01e9g414bgae8eg7c831b37cebf: Spare me the chilling warnings and just tell me where I can find this thing.
h2527f8b8g8b5cg4cadgacafg80643aeec3bd: If I knew that, I wouldn't be back here with half my crew gone.
hdf986bdageff9g423dg9fbcg215f7cf1714f: But look, if you're itching to meet Kelemvor, I won't stop you.
hdfb86b52gea33g40cdg9a1fg2e77079c7425: It's called the Nightsong. Supposed to be hidden under the temple where the goblins jumped us.
h3e537f67g4e6fg42c2g87c9g7ee46f39fc83: I'd give you the map and wish you a happy funeral, but my mate Brian kept hold of it like his own todger. Goblins made short of the fat old chunk.
he6fb3105gecefg4831g8969g26191b40e210: All I've got's the contract. It'll show you where we turned back, if you feel like dying.
h13f774afg4d45g4937g8f33g79c75b043e4a: Heh, don't thank me. I'll be well on my way to Baldur's Gate when you die.
h34d83125g7c71g4498g86c6g73d7e96d264e: And you left him where, exactly?
hac4acd0dge426g4e70gbf61ga19ee3a813e9: Gobbos are holed up in the temple ruins out west of here - last I saw Halsin, he was right in the thick of 'em.
h3303dfebgf1e9g434ega3f6gab3c5067f4e7: If you head that way, you'll likely smell 'em or hear their drums before you see 'em.
hb0fe4a2egba88g4113gad12gb3a0602d687b: Head back to Baldur's Gate. Better empty-handed than dead. I'm done with this shite.
hc0e299e4g8103g4322ga3d4g4ba7c610a145: There's cutthroats there who'll leave you empty-handed and dead, just so you know.
hcd29a25fg370dg4768gb3b6g2b3767b860e2: True enough. City's got pubs, though, don't it.
hb2cff5cdga31eg48d7ga733g2d1cb7c3e4e3: Look me up if you're ever in the city. I owe you a pint.
h61421455ga8f1g4f32g8401gf60c063b58e2: Ain't stayin' around here with horns knocked cold out. Rest of these devils'll be out for blood.
h0b094990g85dbg427fga7b9g04e64c445506: Ain't stayin' around here with this'n knocked cold out. Here's hopin' they'll grant mercy to one of their own.
h49e0e81eg5c38g4ffdga2a5gf975fd8b0dc2: Haven't seen any signs of a city in these parts. How far is it?
h5cb60a7cg7ae8g4c9cgb336g00929f4201cf: Baldur's Gate is legendary. I've never clapped eyes on it, personally.
h616b3c0eg4c59g47c0gbcabg21aa8c78bb1a: Tough hitter like you might last there. Maybe.
hc4518d49g7b78g4612g9267gcbadb5a42f6e: Best of luck. Hope your next contract's more fruitful.
he173d7d7gb557g46e3gb688gba103f59d3e5: Keep that luck, mate. You'll need it.
h9e2d9cb4g667dg4a67ga5b9g1e166d6f6b57: Home sweet home. How far down the Chionthar are we?
ha1d6ffa1g22dfg4195g83e5g8cfa7c4c3785: Far enough that I ain't sure we'll make it back in one piece. And before you ask, I ain't takin' tag-alongs.
he144d53eg2d32g453cga9ffg236bb0547f65: Tell you what though: Look me up if you're ever in the city. I owe you a pint.
h96fbdf3egbdf4g4708g9d42gaf2e3a3e7c25: The Gate will take you for all you're worth with a smile. At least goblins rob you proper.
h3141a5aag2e01g4affg8fcbg5cd0ddab504b: Before you go, let me see that contract. Maybe I'll fare better than you did.
h825388e9g3e9fg4935g9b76ga572c46b4f7b: No points for effort. Care to tell me what this place is?
h99776505gd09eg4018ga098g5efd33775801: It's a druids' grove - fella in charge went by the name Halsin. He ain't here anymore though.
h14748ec6g34e8g4703ga9b9g65b70a3796d8: Aim a blow at the human, trying to knock him flat on his back.
h4a47b134g58e5g40f9g844ag391a0c6b7d19: Druid? Those goblins didn't take any prisoners.
hd632526egf5e9g4fe4gbe82g3ebc2cca363e: We lost him back at the ruins - whole place is crawling with gobbos.
h80891e55g2cc7g4dacgb704g89da6d4c9bb1: Nobody forced him to go with us - he insisted. And when things got tough, he couldn't keep up. Simple as that.
h65d94a0cg565cg47b8g808egd4b94cf83e2f: *The human's eye twitches. He's about to blow.*
hdc77cd7ag3e49g4359g9220g9927f82dc222: You can cough up my payment any time now.
h9a2d40dbg5a66g40a0g83bbgfceae4ee4f26: Stuff your payment. I didn't ask for any goddamn help.
haf0031d0g65a7g440egb61fgf0f526ebd623: Please. You were begging me to open the gate. Anything to save yourself, you coward.
hbbbe7e9bg329cg40d3gb58ag02e49caaa113: Ah, backstabbing. This feels just like home.
h961fb472g89fbg43a3g9422g3688926e6366: Show some respect! This man saved your pathetic life.
he18a4549g941dg4f69ga365gd2bf1ca8b6e4: Show some respect! This woman saved your pathetic life.
h7670f747gd0a7g4969g92e0g9d002af95c12: Well, I didn't ask for any goddamn help.
h1d607b89ga00bg49eag8928gc105e9c7a4e0: Calm down, both of you, before I put you down.
hfc27f131ge6b5g4b75g99aeg6dc3a3124dbb: Stop squealing like hatchlings, or settle this matter in blood.
h85fadc04gc978g4d60gbcadg5445f7579b30: What chewed you up and spit you out?
hdde01dc6g79b8g4eb5gaa25g2cd696147fb8: You lads gonna settle this, or are you just ranting like a couple of derro?
h84934c3dg318fg4991gaf9bg7eef1e69e00e: How about we cool those hot tempers and talk this through calmly?
haf89fc53ge1c9g471aga8f5gb9b3090f7673: I've seen much bloodier battles than this. Consider yourselves lucky.
